headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Amazon, Biogen, Bitcoin, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included the e-commerce leader, a top biotech and the airlines.

headline: Dogecoin Not Cute Enough For Thailand, Country Bans All Meme Coins, NFTs
summary: Thailand has banned all meme tokens, fan tokens, exchange tokens and non-fungible tokens (NFTs), the country’s Securities and Exchange Commission said in a statement Friday.

headline: Carter Worth And Mike Khouw's Adobe Trade
summary: On CNBC's "Options Action," Carter Worth said he thinks Adobe Inc (NASDAQ: ADBE) is solid and strong.

headline: Cramer Gives His Opinion On Nvidia, Spotify And More
summary: On CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said Restoration Hardware Holdings (NYSE: RH) is just getting started and it goes higher.

headline: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin To Live Auction A Seat For Its First Spaceflight Today: How To Watch
summary: Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) founder, Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin, is holding a live auction on Saturday for a seat for its first spaceflight trip next month.
